method: Single-factor weighting (illustrative only; no closed scoring rubric exists yet, see architecture/reasoning-layers.md).

factors.note: Only one sensor reading available; no independent corroboration yet.
Sensor type has an acceptable but unverified calibration history.

known: The sensor logged this reading at the stated time.
inferred: The reading is above baseline if calibration holds.
unknown: Whether a second sensor would reproduce the reading.
missing_evidence: A corroborating reading from an independent instrument.
